facts.claim: Carnival Dream is a unique cruise ship experience packed with delicious dining, memorable entertainment, and heart-racing fun. Despite its name, Carnival Dream is definitely a reality. See photos, staterooms, deck plans, onboard activities, and itinerary options. Book your Carnival Dream cruise today!
Just like a delicious cake, your ship is made of layers. Find out which fun ingredients — staterooms, dining, activities — go into each deck.
Carnival Dream is a cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
She is the lead ship of her namesake class, which includes Carnival Magic, Carnival Breeze, and Costa Diadema.
